title: Light Mobs
description: Light Mobs on fire by Just Right Clicking them with Flint and Steel or a Fire Charge!
body:
> **What this mod adds:**
> - You can now light mobs just by Right-Clicking them with a Fire Charge or Flint and Steel
>
> **Why you should use this Mod:**
> - This makes playing so much Easier Especially Early Game!
> 
> **Credits:**
> - If you use this mod in a modpack please Credit me!
>
